# Sultan Defense

> B2B defense procurement and export partner founded in 1996, supplying tactical equipment and defense technologies through certified manufacturing partners. Focus regions: Middle East, Africa and Turkic Republics.

## Core Pages
- [Home](https://www.sultandefense.com/tr): A to Z defense procurement overview
- [About](https://www.sultandefense.com/tr/hakkimizda): Company background and global sourcing role
- [Products](https://www.sultandefense.com/tr/urunler): Defense and tactical equipment categories
- [Services](https://www.sultandefense.com/tr/hizmetler): Procurement process and export coordination
- [Certifications](https://www.sultandefense.com/tr/certifications): Quality standards and export compliance
- [FAQ](https://www.sultandefense.com/tr/faq): Procurement and quotation questions
- [Contact](https://www.sultandefense.com/tr/iletisim): Export sales contact details

## Contact
